attributes.action: Get rid of Fleetwood Landfill Site!
attributes.additional_details: Get the UK government to clean up and get rid of the Fleetwood Landfill Site as it is now beyond the joke!
attributes.background: Get Starmer to REMOVE the Fleetwood Landfill Site. It makes us ill and is not fair on the citizens of Fleetwood and even Cleveland can smell it. How would you like it mister Starmer if you opened a window of 10 Downing Street and a horrific stench entered your house?

rejection.details: This is principally a local authority planning matter
